name: Quit job post-injury in Draper, lose comp?

mainEntity.name: Quit job post-injury in Draper, lose comp?

acceptedAnswer.description:
**No, quitting doesn't end eligibility if injury-related.**[5]

Benefits continue during recovery; reemployment assistance available.

- Prove quit due to disability.
- Temp total disability pays.
- Retaliation if forced out.

Document reasons; seek vocational help.
